---
title: "Rohlik Sales Forecasting"
date: 2025-09-25
categories: [Machine Learning, Forecasting]
image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/2449665/pexels-photo-2449665.jpeg"
description: "Sales forecasting project using historical grocery warehouse data and LightGBM."
---

![](https://images.pexels.com/photos/2449665/pexels-photo-2449665.jpeg){fig-align="center" width=100%}

*Photo: [Carlo Martin Alcordo](https://www.pexels.com/@carlo-martin-alcordo-1279322/) — Pexels*

## About
Forecast warehouse sales using historical sales data.

## Data
This project uses historical sales data from 7 warehouses of the grocery company Rohlik across 3 countries.  
The training period covers **2020-08-01 to 2024-06-02**, and the goal is to predict sales for the following 13 days, from **2024-06-03 to 2024-06-16**.

## Method
Time-based feature engineering and a gradient boosting model using LightGBM.

## Tools
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/NumPy-013243?logo=numpy&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-150458?logo=pandas),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/SciPy-8CAAE6?logo=scipy&logoColor=white),
![](https://img.shields.io/badge/scikit--learn-F7931E?logo=scikit-learn),
`LightGBM`

## Analysis
[Open the notebook](../notebooks/rohlik_sales_prediction.html)\
[Original Github Repository](https://github.com/lmacakova/rohlik_project)
